title: RevenueCat Customer Center config — Brotein support flows
html:
Brotein paywall infra in RevenueCat — BroteinOfficialPaywall Customer Center setup. Configures self-service screens (Missing Purchase / Change Plans / Cancel / Refund Request) for active vs non-subscribers, with promo offers and appearance/localization tabs.

TL;DR

  • Brotein's subscription support layer runs through RevenueCat's Customer Center, not custom code — Yahir is configuring self-service flows for cancel/refund/change plans.
  • "Show purchase history" and "warn users not on latest version" toggles are part of the default config.
  • Customers without active subs get a separate Management Options screen — anti-churn surface for trial dropouts.

brotein · revenuecat · subscription monetization · churn mitigation · anabolic scoring
